title: Al Tamimi Law Firm ransomware incident

extortion.description: Founded by Essam Al Tamimi in 1989, Al Tamimi & Company has become the largest law firm in the Middle East with offices in Bahrain, Egypt, Iraq, Jordan, Kuwait, Oman, Qatar, Saudi Arabia and the United Arab Emirates. The firm employs more than 360 lawyers and has over 720 staff in total.
